channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Android : une faille critique de Gemini permet d’envoyer des messages sans déverrouiller l’écran
item.description: Il est malheureusement possible de contourner la sécurité de l'écran de verrouillage d'Android en envoyant des messages via Gemini, sans avoir à rentrer votre code PIN.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 leak teases thinner, brighter flagship smartwatch
item.description: A fresh leak reveals new specs for Samsung's Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, days before it's rumored to appear.

item.title: Ernst & Young reveals data breach following hack on support system
item.description: Someone pulled sensitive customer data from EY's servers, but the data is yet to surface anywhere.

item.title: Segway C2 Pro E : la sérieuse trottinette électrique pour enfants chute sous les 250 € chez Boulanger
item.description: La Segway C2 Pro E est une trottinette électrique taillée pour les enfants et jeunes ados. Sur Boulanger, elle passe de 279 euros à 249 euros, une occasion de s'équiper avant la rentrée sans payer le prix fort.

item.title: YouTube picture-in-picture mode seems to be broken on Android and iOS, and Google is 'actively investigating'
item.description: Some (but not all) users are reporting that picture-in-picture has stopped working properly on mobile.

item.title: AliExpress fined almost $630 million over illegal product sales
item.description: AliExpress has been hit with a €550 million (about $629 million) fine for violating Europe's Digital Services Act (DSA) rules by failing to prevent illegal, unsafe, or counterfeit products from being sold on the e-commerce platform. The European Commission ruled that AliExpress didn't take effective measures to reduce the dissemination of illegal products, noting the […]...

item.title: Kapwing AI video editor review
item.description: In our Kapwing review, we thoroughly examine the pros and cons of the platform relative to other top AI video editing solutions.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 et Ultra 2 : une fuite dévoile les nouveautés avant l’annonce
item.description: La Watch 9 intègrera un processeur Snapdragon Wear Elite qui devrait lui permettre une meilleure fluidité de l’interface et une gestion plus avancée des fonctions d’intelligence artificielle. La Ultra 2 sera quant à elle plus fine et bénéficiera d’une meilleure autonomie.

item.title: I've reviewed or covered about 17 power banks — and Iniu's chic MagSafe 45W is the first one that feels like it actually has some personality
item.description: Super slim, fast-charging, an LCD panel and a discreet cable — Iniu's 45W MagSafe power bank has pretty much everything I could want from a portable phone charger.

item.title: “Brain fry” and broken promises: The hidden cost of AI without architecture
item.description: AI deployment without the right operational structure is leaving employees exposed to ‘AI brain fry’.

item.title: The 35 Best Board Games for Family Game Night
item.description: From monsters to kittens to strategy games, these sets will liven things up on nights when everyone is tired of screens.

item.title: Personal tragedy made Care.com CEO Brad Wilson a more empathetic leader—and more tolerant of risk
item.description: The executive says his wife’s illness and death deepened his understanding of the caregiving platform and its users. Hello and welcome to Modern CEO! I’m Stephanie Mehta, CEO and chief content officer of Mansueto Ventures. Each week this newsletter explores inclusive approaches to leadership drawn from conversations with executives and entrepreneurs, and from the pages of Inc. and Fast Company. If you received this newsletter from a friend, you can sign up to get it yourself every Monday morning. ...

item.title: The HP Omen 35L Ryzen 7 PC for $2140 is my top pick in Best Buy's Black Friday in July sale (and you can get a $50 office chair with it too)
item.description: Save $560 on an HP Omen creative desktop and get a $180 GTPlayer gaming chair for just $50.

item.title: The Google Pixel 10a is on offer at T-Mobile — here’s how to save up to $800
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a is now available at T-Mobile. Learn how new and existing customers can save up to $800 with a qualifying new-line offer.

item.title: English footballer Wayne Rooneys blunt reaction to World Cup halftime show goes viral
item.description: Footage of former England footballer and BBC Sport pundit Wayne Rooney's reaction to the World Cup halftime show has gone viral.

item.title: Microsoft is cutting support for some older OneDrive systems soon - here's what you need to know
item.description: Windows 10 21H2 and earlier is no longer being supported for OneDrive – 22H2 continues to get support until October 2028.

item.title: What is the release date for Ransom Canyon season 2 on Netflix?
item.description: Has anything really changed in the year we've spent away from the canyon? It's unlikely — but when does Ransom Canyon season 2 arrive on Netflix?

item.title: Get a like-new Kindle Scribe for $323.99 at Amazon — save over $80 for a limited time
item.description: Find the best Kindle Scribe deal at Amazon. Save 20% on the Like-New Kindle Scribe at Amazon.

item.title: Samsungs new 990 SSD has dropped — features, price, and where to buy
item.description: Samsung has officially launched the 990 SSD with PCIe Gen 4 performance, up to 2TB of storage, and improved power efficiency. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: Pour finir les soldes en beauté, Darty retire plus de 800 € à l’iPad Pro de 11 pouces avec une puce M4 et 2 To de stockage
item.description: L'iPad Pro M4 est une tablette tactile qui se rapproche d'un laptop par ses performances. Chez Darty, il voit son prix chuter à 1 599,99 euros au lieu de 2 429 euros.

item.title: The World Cup stress test is here. Here are three ways employers can come out ahead
item.description: The World Cup reveals how organizations must plan for disruption and respond to workforce changes effectively.

item.title: BTS met IShowSpeed at the World Cup final and its everything
item.description: BTS and IShowSpeed met each other in the hallway at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final and the video is pure glee with added backflip.

item.title: Dernier jour des soldes : Amazon casse ses prix une dernière fois, voici les offres à ne pas rater
item.description: Les soldes d’été se terminent officiellement demain : c'est donc votre toute dernière chance de dénicher des prix bradés juste avant de partir en vacances ! Pour cette ultime journée, Amazon sort le grand jeu et casse encore ses prix avec une série de très belles offres Tech à saisir d'urgence. Voici notre sélection des meilleures pépites à ne pas manquer. ...

item.title: 5 sur 5 : EA Sports FC n’a toujours pas raté un vainqueur de Coupe du monde depuis 2010
item.description: Depuis 2010, EA Sports FC n'a jamais raté un vainqueur de Coupe du monde. En 2026, l'algorithme voyait déjà juste avec l'Espagne, sacrée dimanche.

item.title: A Beginner’s Guide to Growing Mushrooms at Home (2026)
item.description: From countertop kits to a bathroom bucket full of straw and beyond, I spent a year testing popular mushroom-growing methods. Here’s what fruited—and what just grew mold.

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday tickets are going on sale shortly — and some fans are convinced that Marvel will surprise us, and reveal the new MCU movie's official trailer, too
item.description: Marvel fans have a new theory about Avengers: Doomsday's next trailer — but it's not one I can get on board with.

item.title: Why the next computing revolution will be hybrid, human and slightly unpredictable
item.description: As AI drives demand, quantum is finally becoming part of real-world systems.

item.title: Vinabot AI Talking Frame : le cadre photo qui change de dimension et donne une voix aux souvenirs
item.description: Vinabot lance officiellement son cadre photo intelligent capable de faire parler n'importe quel visage. Déclinés en deux tailles, ces écrans mêlent affichage premium et intelligence artificielle conversationnelle.

item.title: Ever wondered whether upping the sound quality of your PS5 might improve your gaming chops? If so, Topping’s cheap new DAC is worth an audition
item.description: Topping's new DX1 II is an affordable DAC which is targeted specifically towards Switch or PS5 gamers —but even non-gamers should take note for this price

item.title: China delivers a one-two punch to America’s AI dominance
item.description: China's leading AI companies are ramping up the pressure on Silicon Valley, as Moonshot and Alibaba unveiled models they claim can go toe-to-toe with the best from OpenAI and Anthropic at a fraction of the cost. The rapid-fire releases suggest America's lead at the AI frontier is increasingly tight, just as the technology is becoming […]

item.title: An Ebike Company Was Sued for Misleading Info on Safety. It Points to a Big Problem
item.description: Several Chinese businesses associated with the ebike brand Aipas settled a lawsuit with Amazon and the safety certification company UL in July.

item.title: Windows 11 va enfin corriger l’un de ses pires défauts : la recherche dans l’Explorateur de fichiers
item.description: La recherche s'améliore de toutes parts dans Windows 11, y compris là où elle est la plus lente. Microsoft confirme vouloir accélérer drastiquement la recherche dans l'Explorateur de fichiers, abandonné par les utilisateurs à cause de ses performances catastrophiques.

item.title: Quel mini PC choisir pour l’IA ? Notre sélection 2026
item.description: Un mini PC fait un excellent serveur maison pour l'IA : posé dans un coin du bureau, il consomme peu, reste silencieux et tourne en permanence pour héberger vos agents, vos automatisations et quelques modèles en local. Le tout en complément du cloud, pas en remplacement. Voici les machines qu'on recommande, et ce qu'il faut regarder avant d'acheter. ...

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's leather jacket sells for nearly $1 million at Sotheby’s auction
item.description: One of Jensen Huang's black leather jackets, a 2023 Tom Ford example, sellsfor $960,000 at a New York auction.

item.title: Coupe du Monde 2026 : 12 millions de comptes de streaming ont été piratés et revendus sur le dark web
item.description: Selon une étude menée par l’entreprise HUMAN Security, plus de 12 millions de comptes de streaming volés ont été revendus sur le dark web. Certains identifiants volés étaient revendus à partir de 5 dollars, tandis que des accès à des offres premium pouvaient atteindre 50 dollars.

item.title: The ACLU Is Arming Lawyers to Expose State Surveillance Secrets
item.description: A new toolkit for attorneys in Massachusetts targets the technologies police use—and conceal—to build criminal cases, from facial recognition to AI-written police reports.

item.title: Elite Young Runners Are Becoming Freakishly Fast. Welcome to ‘Trackflation’
item.description: Four-minute miles are almost routine. Middle schoolers are beating college runners. Inside the youth track boom that’s turning kids and teens into speed machines.

item.title: The iconic ‘Fearless Girl’ statue is becoming a brand
item.description: State Street, the company that commissioned her, is launching a website and merchandise line. For years, the Charging Bull statue was the icon of Wall Street, meant to represent the financial might of a bull market. But over the past decade, it has been eclipsed by a very different sculpture.

item.title: Is China replacing the U.S. as the world’s AI touchpoint thanks to Kimi K3?
item.description: Social media has been ablaze with eye-popping demonstrations of the model’s prowess. The release of Kimi K3, an artificial intelligence model created by a former computer science graduate student at Carnegie Mellon University, has rocked parts of social media and the AI commentariat. The model, developed by Moonshot AI—a Chinese lab cofounded by that ex-student, Yang Zhilin—has wowed many observers with its capabilities....

item.title: Mignon, rétro et à prix cassé, l’appareil photo Kodak EC35 semble parfait pour les vacances
item.description: Un appareil photo à moins de 40 euros, aussi simple que mignon. C'est la promesse du Kodak EC35. Donnez-lui des piles et une pellicule, et il prendra vos photos de vacances.

item.title: You’re probably delegating wrong. Here’s what to do to fix that
item.description: Stop handing off work. Start developing people. Too many leaders approach delegation only as an opportunity to transfer work off their plate. The challenge with this is they often find themselves disappointed and let down when the quality of the work falls short of expectations, the project is late, and important details are missed.

item.title: Everyone is now an AI company. But here’s the real challenge
item.description: Saying your fintech uses AI now means as much as saying you have a website.

item.title: DeepSeek founder’s fund drops 15.7% on AI selloff
item.description: The CSI 1000 Index fell more than 12% over the week, its worst drop since a quant selloff in February 2024.
